1.premise: Environmentalism and racism can overlap absurdly.
Tesla power shifts from clean energy to white supremacy.

2.premise: What if the KKK made cross burnings eco-friendly.
Sports matchups can accidentally echo racial history.

1.premise: Cowboys versus Redskins on Thanksgiving resembles a reenactment.

2.premise: What if a police team played a racial-slur team on Juneteenth.

lines.text: I just realized I think everything is a little racist.
